text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Sociotechnical Safety Evaluation of Generative AI Systems" is real and authored by Laura Weidinger, Maribeth Rauh, Nahema Marchal, and colleagues — exactly matching the cited authors. The only error in the reference is the arXiv ID: the correct ID is 2310.11986, not 2310.06682 as cited.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.11986
